title: Paint
description: A canvas-based drawing component that provides a comprehensive painting interface with multiple drawing tools, color customization, and image export capabilities. This component is commonly used for signature capture, image annotation, and basic drawing applications.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-paint-container with ax-paint-view

sections.title: Signature Box
sections.description: Creating a signature capture interface using the paint component with validation

types.title: AXPaintContainerComponent
types.description: The main container component that provides the paint interface with toolbars and drawing tools

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the paint component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: editMode
props.description: When true, automatically activates the pen tool and hides the main toolbar

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the canvas value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onTextChanged
events.description: Emitted when the text content changes. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Emitted when a key is pressed down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Emitted when a key is released. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Emitted when a key is pressed. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look style changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets the active drawing tool.
 *
 * @param tool - The tool to activate: 'pen', 'highlight', or 'eraser'
 */
setActiveTool(tool: 'pen' | 'highlight' | 'eraser'): void

/**
 * Sets the pen color for drawing.
 *
 * @param color - The color to use for the pen tool
 */
setPenColor(color: string | CanvasGradient | CanvasPattern): void

/**
 * Sets the highlight color for highlighting.
 *
 * @param color - The color to use for the highlight tool
 */
setHighlightColor(color: string | CanvasGradient | CanvasPattern): void

/**
 * Sets the pen width for drawing.
 *
 * @param width - The width of the pen stroke in pixels
 */
setPenWidth(width: number): void

/**
 * Sets the highlight width for highlighting.
 *
 * @param width - The width of the highlight stroke in pixels
 */
setHighlightWidth(width: number): void

/**
 * Sets the eraser width for erasing.
 *
 * @param width - The width of the eraser in pixels
 */
setEraserWidth(width: number): void

/**
 * Clears the entire canvas.
 */
clear(): void

types.title: AXPaintViewComponent
types.description: The canvas view component that handles the actual drawing operations

props.name: customClass
props.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the component

props.name: paintBackgroundColor
props.description: The background color of the paint canvas

methods.content:
/**
 * Exports the canvas content as an image.
 *
 * @param format - The image format: 'image/webp', 'image/png', or 'image/jpeg'
 */
getOutPut(format: 'image/webp' | 'image/png' | 'image/jpeg'): void
